Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***************************************************************************************

 The Dual Beck-Chevalley condition

 In the setting of categorical logic, quantifiers are interpreted as certain adjoints.
 More concretely, existential quantifiers and sigma types are interpreted as left adjoints
 of weakening, whereas universal quantifiers and pi types are interpreted as right adjoints
 of weakening. These quantifiers must also satisfy a condition that expresses stability
 under substitution: more concretely, if we perform a substitution on a universal
 quantifier, then we again get a universally quantified formula. In the semantics, these
 stability axioms are expressed as Beck-Chevalley conditions.

 If we are interested in first-order logic with quantifiers (semantically, a hyperdoctrine)
 or in dependent type theory with sigma types and pi types (semantically, a comprehension
 category), then we need the Beck-Chevalley condition for both the universal and the
 existential quantifier. However, it suffices to verify only one of those. More specifically,
 if the existential quantifier is stable under substitution, then so is the universal
 quantifier. For this reason, only one Beck-Chevalley condition is usually required in
 the definition of hyperdoctrines (see, e.g., "Hyperdoctrines, natural deduction and the
 Beck condition" by Seely).

 In this file, we prove this statement. More specifically, suppose that we have a fibration
 `D` over `C` and a commuting square `k · f = h · g` where `f : x --> w`, `g : y --> w`,
 `h : z --> y`, and `k : z --> x`, and suppose that pulling back along `f` and h` has a
 right adjoint, and pulling back along `g` and `k` has a left adjoint. If we can verify
 the Beck-Chevalley condition for the left adjoints of `g` and `k`, then the Beck-Chevalley
 condition also holds for the right adjoints of `f` and `g`.

 References
 - "Hyperdoctrines, natural deduction and the Beck condition" by Seely

 ***************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiberwise.DependentSums.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiberwise.DependentProducts.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section DualBeckChevalley.
  Context {C : category}
          {D : disp_cat C}
          (HD : cleaving D)
          {w x y z : C}
          {f : x --> w}
          {g : y --> w}
          {h : z --> y}
          {k : z --> x}
          {p : k · f = h · g}
          {P₁ : dependent_product HD f}
          {P₂ : dependent_product HD h}
          {S₁ : dependent_sum HD g}
          {S₂ : dependent_sum HD k}
          (HB : left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (!p) S₁ S₂).

  Let F : D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}] := fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f.
  Let R₁ : D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}] := right_adjoint P₁.
  Let η₁ : functor_identity _ ⟹ F ∙ R₁
    := unit_from_left_adjoint P₁.
  Let ε₁ : R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity _
    := counit_from_left_adjoint P₁.

  Let H : D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}] := fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h.
  Let R₂ : D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}] := right_adjoint P₂.
  Let η₂ : functor_identity _ ⟹ H ∙ R₂
    := unit_from_left_adjoint P₂.
  Let ε₂ : R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity _
    := counit_from_left_adjoint P₂.

  Let G : D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}] := fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g.
  Let L₁ : D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
    := left_adjoint S₁.
  Let φ₁ : functor_identity _ ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
    := unit_from_right_adjoint S₁.
  Let ψ₁ : G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity _
    := counit_from_right_adjoint S₁.

  Let K : D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}] := fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k.
  Let L₂ : D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
    := left_adjoint S₂.
  Let φ₂ : functor_identity _ ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
    := unit_from_right_adjoint S₂.
  Let ψ₂ : K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity _
    := counit_from_right_adjoint S₂.

  Let τ : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
    := comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (!p).
  Let ℓ_iso : nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
    := make_nat_z_iso
         _ _
         (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ)
         HB.
  Let ℓ : H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
    := left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ.
  Let ℓi : L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
    := nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso.

  Let θ : nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
    := comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p.
  Let ρ : R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
    := right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ.

  #[local] Opaque fiber_category.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
nat_z_iso_inv (comm_nat_z_iso HD f g h k p)
  (right_adjoint P₁ xx) = τ (R₁ xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
nat_z_iso_inv (comm_nat_z_iso HD f g h k p)
  (right_adjoint P₁ xx) = τ (R₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
nat_z_iso_inv (comm_nat_z_iso HD f g h k p)
  (right_adjoint P₁ xx) =
comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p) (R₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD g h
  (right_adjoint P₁ xx)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr2 (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD p)
       (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr2
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD
          f k) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD g h
  (R₁ xx)
· (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr2
          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso
             HD f k) (R₁ xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD g h
  (right_adjoint P₁ xx)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (pr2 (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD p)
        (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr2
          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso
             HD f k) (right_adjoint P₁ xx))) =
fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD g h
  (R₁ xx)
· (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (pr2
          (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso
             HD f k) (R₁ xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr2 (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD p)
     (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr2
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD
          f k) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (pr2
       (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_nat_z_iso HD
          f k) (R₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr2 (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD p)
     (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism_mor
  (pr2 (fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD p)
     (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD z0
        (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p)
· fiber_functor_on_eq_nat_z_iso HD (! p) (R₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
      HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p)
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx))
       (! p))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
         HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p @
      maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx)) (! p)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
         HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p @
      maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx)) (! p))) =
identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
         HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p @
      maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx)) (! p))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧,
         HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) p @
      maponpaths
        (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx)) (! p))) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
  p @
maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, HD w z z0 (R₁ xx))
  (! p) = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, pr1 (HD w z q (R₁ xx)))
  (p @ ! p) = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, pr1 (HD w z q (R₁ xx)))
  (idpath (k · f)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ q : C ⟦ z, w ⟧, pr1 (HD w z q (R₁ xx)))
        (idpath (k · f)))) =
identity (HD w z (k · f) (right_adjoint P₁ xx))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ xx =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ xx = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ xx = ?b

      apply right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans_ob.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
unit_from_left_adjoint P₂ (G (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· # (right_adjoint P₂) (θ (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· # (right_adjoint P₂)
    (# K (counit_from_left_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
unit_from_left_adjoint P₂ (G (right_adjoint P₁ xx))
· # (right_adjoint P₂) (θ (right_adjoint P₁ xx)) =
η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
θ (right_adjoint P₁ xx) = τ (R₁ xx)

    apply inv_of_comm_nat_z_iso.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) =
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) =
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))

    apply left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans_ob.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (R₂ (K xx)) =
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (R₂ (K xx)) =
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))

    apply left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans_ob.
  Qed.

  #[local] Opaque F G H K η₁ η₂ ε₁ ε₂ φ₁ φ₂ ψ₁ ψ₂ R₁ R₂ L₁ L₂ ℓi ℓ ρ τ.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx =
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx =
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx =
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx =
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) = # L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
   · (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)))) =
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
   · (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = # L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
· (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))))
   · (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)))) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
