L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (G (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (G (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = ?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (G (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = ?y'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?y' =
φ₂ (H (G (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (# L₂ (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))

      apply (nat_trans_ax φ₂).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# (functor_identity D[{z}]) (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· φ₂ (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))) · φ₂ (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))) · φ₂ (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) =
τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))) · identity (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (φ₂ (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))) =
τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))) · identity (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K (ψ₂ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) =
identity (K (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))

    apply (pr222 S₂).
  Qed.

  Definition right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inv
             (xx : D[{x}])
    : R₂(K xx) --> G(R₁ xx)
    := φ₁ _ · #G(η₁ _ · #R₁(ℓi _ · #L₂(ε₂ _) · ψ₂ _)).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat (ρ xx)
  (right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inv xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat (ρ xx)
  (right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inv xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat (ρ xx)
  (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · # G
       (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
        · # R₁
            (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · # G
       (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
        · # R₁
            (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
· # G
    (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
     · # R₁
         (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))
· ρ xx = identity ((K ∙ R₂) xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · # G
       (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
        · # R₁
            (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · # G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
         · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx))))) =
identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
            · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)))))) =
identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
            · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)))))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx
· (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
            · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)))))) = ?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx · φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))) · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ρ xx · φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax φ₁ _ _ (ρ xx)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₁ ((R₁ ∙ G) xx) · # (L₁ ∙ G) (ρ xx)
· # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))) · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)) =
identity ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₁ (G (R₁ xx)) · # G (# L₁ (ρ xx))
· # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
· # G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))) · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)) =
identity (G (R₁ xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))
· (# G (# L₁ (ρ xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
            · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)))))) =
identity (G (R₁ xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₁ (G (R₁ xx))
· (# G (# L₁ (ρ xx))
   · (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
         · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
            · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx)))))) =
adjunit
  (pr1 S₁,,
   fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
   pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁)
  (right_functor
     (pr1 S₁,,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
      pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx))
· # (right_functor
       (pr1 S₁,,
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
        pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁))
    (adjcounit
       (pr1 S₁,,
        fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
        pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# G (# L₁ (ρ xx))
· (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
   · (# G (# R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (# G (# R₁ (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))))
         · # G (# R₁ (ψ₂ xx))))) =
# (right_functor
     (pr1 S₁,,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
      pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁))
  (adjcounit
     (pr1 S₁,,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
      pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# G
  (# L₁ (ρ xx)
   · (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
      · # R₁
          (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
# (right_functor
     (pr1 S₁,,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
      pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁))
  (adjcounit
     (pr1 S₁,,
      fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
      pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx)
· (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
adjcounit
  (pr1 S₁,,
   fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g,,
   pr112 S₁,, pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx)
· (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
(pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
(pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
q: (pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)
# L₁ (ρ xx)
· (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
(pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
(pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
q: (pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)
# L₁ (ρ xx)
· (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
(pr212 S₁) (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx)
· (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx) · η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· # R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧

p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx) · η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· # R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
?b

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
