R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx) · η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· # R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₁ (ρ xx) · η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax η₁ _ _ (#L₁ (ρ xx))).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ ((R₁ ∙ G) xx)) · # (F ∙ R₁) (# L₁ (ρ xx))
· # R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx))) · # R₁ (# F (# L₁ (ρ xx)))
· # R₁ (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· (# R₁ (# F (# L₁ (ρ xx)))
   · # R₁
       (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (# F (# L₁ (ρ xx))
     · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (# F (# L₁ (ρ xx))
     · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (# F (# L₁ (ρ xx))
     · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# F (# L₁ (ρ xx))
· (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) = 
?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# F (# L₁ (ρ xx)) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))
· ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# F (# L₁ (ρ xx)) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax ℓi _ _ (ρ xx)).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi ((R₁ ∙ G) xx) · # (H ∙ L₂) (ρ xx)
     · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx)) · # L₂ (# H (ρ xx))
     · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# H (ρ xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) = ?y'

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# L₂ (# H (ρ xx) · ε₂ (K xx)) = ?y'

HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g

P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# H
  (η₂ (G (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx))
   · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx) = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (η₂ (G (R₁ xx))) · # H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)))
· # H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx) = ?t2

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g

P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (η₂ (G (R₁ xx)))
· (# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)))
   · (# H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx))) = ?t2

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# H (η₂ (G (R₁ xx)))
· (# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)))
   · (# H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx))) = ?b

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g

P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

?b = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (η₂ (G (R₁ xx)))
· (# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)))
   · (# H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx))) = ?b

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)))
· (# H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) · ε₂ (K xx)) = ?t20

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx))) · # H (# R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)))
· ε₂ (K xx) = ?t20

· ε₂ (K xx) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

?b = ?t20

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)))
· ε₂ (K xx) = ?b

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))) = ?y'

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)) = ?t21

f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g

P₂: dependent_product HD h

S₂: dependent_sum HD k

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)

  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?t21 = # R₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # R₂ (# K (ε₁ xx))

            apply (functor_comp R₂).

D: disp_cat C

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂
          (identity
             (left_functor
                (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h,,
                 pr1 P₂,, pr112 P₂,, pr212 P₂)
                (G (R₁ xx))) · τ (R₁ xx) · # K (ε₁ xx))
        · ψ₂ xx)) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂
          (identity (HD y z h (G (R₁ xx))) · τ (R₁ xx)
           · # K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx) · # K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx) · # K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx) · # K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F

θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx) · # K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]

θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · # L₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx = ?t2

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g

P₂: dependent_product HD h

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (# L₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (# K (ε₁ xx)) · ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        apply (nat_trans_ax ψ₂).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx))
        · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx))
           · # (functor_identity D[{x}]) (ε₁ xx)))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx))) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx))) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx) = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?t2 = # L₂ (τ (R₁ xx)) · (ψ₂ (F (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)

        apply dual_left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans_ob_alt.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)) =
ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
η₁ (L₁ (G (R₁ xx)))
· # R₁
    (ℓi (G (R₁ xx))
     · (ℓ (G (R₁ xx)) · # F (ψ₁ (R₁ xx)) · ε₁ xx)) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ψ₁ (R₁ xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
