η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# R₂
  (# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) =
# (right_functor
     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h,,
      pr1 P₂,, pr112 P₂,, pr212 P₂))
  (adjcounit
     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h,,
      pr1 P₂,, pr112 P₂,, pr212 P₂) (K xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
adjcounit
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h,,
   pr1 P₂,, pr112 P₂,, pr212 P₂) (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
(pr212 P₂) (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
(pr212 P₂) (K xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
q: (pr212 P₂) (K xx) = ε₂ (K xx)
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
(pr212 P₂) (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
(pr212 P₂) (K xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

        apply idpath.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
q: (pr212 P₂) (K xx) = ε₂ (K xx)
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
(pr212 P₂) (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ε₂ (K xx)

# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)) · # G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = ?y'

        apply functor_comp.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx))) · # H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) =
ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) = ?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· (τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
        · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K
    (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
     · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (# G (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· τ (R₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))) = ?y'

        apply (nat_trans_ax τ).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # (F ∙ K) (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
        · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # K (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
   · # K
       (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
        · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · (# K (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) =
ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · (# K (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# H (φ₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
· (τ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · (# K (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
      · # K
          (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
           · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx))
              · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))))) = ?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# K (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))))
· # K
    (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
     · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# K
  (# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
   · (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
      · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)))) =
?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· (ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
   · (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# F (η₁ (L₁ (R₂ (K xx)))) · ε₁ (F (L₁ (R₂ (K xx))))
· ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (ℓ (R₂ (K xx)))
· # K (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# K (ℓ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # K (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
ε₂ (K xx)

f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# K (ℓ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # K (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?b = ε₂ (K xx)

· (# K (ℓ (R₂ (K xx)))
   · # K (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx))) =
?b

· # K (ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx)) =
?t2

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D

f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧

P₂: dependent_product HD h

S₂: dependent_sum HD k

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (R₂ (K xx)) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))
· ψ₂ xx = ?t2

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ℓ (R₂ (K xx)) · ℓi (R₂ (K xx)) = ?y'

        exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso ℓ_iso (R₂(K xx)))).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx)))
· # K
    (identity ((H ∙ L₂) (R₂ (K xx)))
     · # L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)) · ψ₂ xx) =
ε₂ (K xx)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx)))
· (# K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))) · # K (ψ₂ xx)) = ε₂ (K xx)

g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧

p: k · f = h · g

S₂: dependent_sum HD k

ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))
· # K (ψ₂ xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

· # K (ψ₂ xx) = ?b

D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]

ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]

L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]

  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)

ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂

?b = ε₂ (K xx)

ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
