φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))
· # K (ψ₂ xx) = ?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx))) = ?y'

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
?y' = φ₂ (H (R₂ (K xx))) · # K (# L₂ (ε₂ (K xx)))

        apply (nat_trans_ax φ₂).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
# (functor_identity D[{z}]) (ε₂ (K xx)) · φ₂ (K xx)
· # K (ψ₂ xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ε₂ (K xx) · φ₂ (K xx) · # K (ψ₂ xx) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ε₂ (K xx) · (φ₂ (K xx) · # K (ψ₂ xx)) = ε₂ (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
ε₂ (K xx) · (φ₂ (K xx) · # K (ψ₂ xx)) =
ε₂ (K xx) · identity (K xx)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
φ₂ (K xx) · # K (ψ₂ xx) = identity (K xx)

      apply (pr222 S₂).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
right_beck_chevalley HD f g h k p P₁ P₂

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
right_beck_chevalley HD f g h k p P₁ P₂

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_z_isomorphism
  (right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂
     (comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p) xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
D[{y}]
⟦ (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k
   ∙ right_adjoint P₂) xx,
(right_adjoint P₁ ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  xx ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat
  (right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂
     (comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p) xx) 
  ?g

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
D[{y}]
⟦ (fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k
   ∙ right_adjoint P₂) xx,
(right_adjoint P₁ ∙ fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g)
  xx ⟧
 exact (right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inv xx).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
HD: cleaving D
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, w ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, w ⟧
h: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
k: C ⟦ z, x ⟧
p: k · f = h · g
P₁: dependent_product HD f
P₂: dependent_product HD h
S₁: dependent_sum HD g
S₂: dependent_sum HD k
HB: left_beck_chevalley HD g f k h (! p) S₁ S₂
F:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD f: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{x}]
R₁:= right_adjoint P₁: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{w}]
η₁:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₁: functor_identity D[{w}] ⟹ F ∙ R₁
ε₁:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₁: R₁ ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
H:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD h: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{z}]
R₂:= right_adjoint P₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{y}]
η₂:= unit_from_left_adjoint P₂: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ H ∙ R₂
ε₂:= counit_from_left_adjoint P₂: R₂ ∙ H ⟹ functor_identity D[{z}]
G:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD g: D[{w}] ⟶ D[{y}]
L₁:= left_adjoint S₁: D[{y}] ⟶ D[{w}]
φ₁:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₁: functor_identity D[{y}] ⟹ L₁ ∙ G
ψ₁:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₁: G ∙ L₁ ⟹ functor_identity D[{w}]
K:= fiber_functor_from_cleaving D HD k: D[{x}] ⟶ D[{z}]
L₂:= left_adjoint S₂: D[{z}] ⟶ D[{x}]
φ₂:= unit_from_right_adjoint S₂: functor_identity D[{z}] ⟹ L₂ ∙ K
ψ₂:= counit_from_right_adjoint S₂: K ∙ L₂ ⟹ functor_identity D[{x}]
τ:= comm_nat_z_iso HD g f k h (! p): nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ℓ_iso:= make_nat_z_iso (H ∙ left_adjoint S₂)
  (left_adjoint S₁ ∙ F)
  (left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ) HB: nat_z_iso (H ∙ L₂) (L₁ ∙ F)
ℓ:= left_beck_chevalley_nat_trans S₁ S₂ τ: H ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ F
ℓi:= nat_z_iso_inv ℓ_iso: L₁ ∙ F ⟹ H ∙ L₂
θ:= comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p: nat_z_iso (G ∙ H) (F ∙ K)
ρ:= right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂ θ: R₁ ∙ G ⟹ K ∙ R₂
xx: D[{x}]
is_inverse_in_precat
  (right_beck_chevalley_nat_trans P₁ P₂
     (comm_nat_z_iso_inv HD f g h k p) xx)
  (right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inv xx)
 exact (right_from_left_beck_chevalley_inverses xx).
  Defined.
End DualBeckChevalley.
